name: Shrimp & Dill Sauce in Artichoke Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the artichokes.
2. Cut off stem ends and trim about 1 inch from the top of each artichoke, removing about a fourth of the outer leaves. Rub the tops of the artichokes and trimmed leaves with a lemon wedge. Wrap in wax paper and microwave until tender. Place upside down on a rack to cool.
3. Spread center leaves apart and remove the choke (if desired). Chill if desired.
4. Bring 1 1/2 cups water to a boil in a saucepan. Add shrimp. Reduce heat and cook for 3 minutes. Drain well and rinse with cold water. Chill.
5. Peel and devein the shrimp; set aside.
6. Combine yogurt and the next four ingredients (including grated lemon rind) in a small bowl. Stir well.
7. Spoon 1/4 cup of yogurt mixture into each center of artichokes.
8. Arrange shrimp around the upper edge of each artichoke, hanging over.
9. Garnish with additional dillweed.
